## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New component (non-breaking change that adds a new component)
- [ ] Enhancement (non-breaking change that improves existing functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CSS / Styling change

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project conventions (`Rn` prefix, `cn-` CSS classes, `data-slot`)
- [ ] I have included `AdditionalAttributes` and `Class` parameters
- [ ] I have added/updated CSS in `shadcn.src.css` (not `shadcn.css`)
- [ ] I have built both CSS pipelines (`Daeha.RnUI` and `Demo.Wasm`)
- [ ] I have added bUnit tests for new/changed components
- [ ] I have added a demo page (for new components)
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, localized docs, component catalog)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] I have verified accessibility (`role`, `aria-*`, keyboard navigation)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots of the component/change.
